channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [EXCELSOFT] Excelsoft Technologies Independent Director Resigns to Pursue Executive Position
item.description:
Excelsoft Technologies Ltd announced the resignation of its Independent Director, Mr. Doreswamy Palaniswamy, with effect from the close of business hours on March 17, 2026. The resignation is due to his decision to pursue a challenging executive position outside the organization, which will require his full focus, time, and commitment. Mr. Palaniswamy also ceased to be a Member of the Audit Committee and the Nomination & Remuneration Committee of the Company.

  • Mr. Doreswamy Palaniswamy resigned from his position as Independent Director of Excelsoft Technologies Ltd.
  • The resignation is to pursue a challenging executive position outside the organization.
  • Mr. Palaniswamy ceased to be a Member of the Audit Committee and the Nomination & Remuneration Committee.
  • The Board of Directors acknowledged his valuable contribution and guidance during his association with the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Excelsoft Technologies Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital Successfully Closes Maiden ECB Issuance-Strengthens Liability Franchise
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Paisalo Digital Limited, a leading non-banking finance company (NBFC) focused on inclusive lending, has successfully completed its inaugural External Commercial Borrowing (ECB) transaction amounting to USD 15 million. This strategic step aims to broaden the Company’s funding mix and access cost-effective, long-tenor capital from international markets. The proceeds will support the Company’s expanding lending portfolio, with a focus on MSMEs, income-generation segments, and other priority sectors. The transaction strengthens Paisalo’s overall liability structure, optimizes the blended cost of capital, and underscores strong lender confidence in the Company’s underwriting practices, resilient asset quality, and scalable, technology-enabled distribution model.

  • Paisalo Digital successfully closes its maiden ECB issuance of USD 15 million
  • The ECB issuance marks a strategic step in liability diversification and accessing cost-effective capital
  • Proceeds to support the Company’s expanding lending portfolio, focusing on priority sectors
  • The transaction strengthens Paisalo’s liability structure and optimizes the blended cost of capital
  • Lender confidence in Paisalo’s underwriting practices, resilient asset quality, and scalable business model

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [STAR] Strides Pharma Science Acquires Multiple Generic Brands from Sandoz, Strengthening its Africa Business
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Strides Pharma Science Ltd. has signed definitive agreements with Sandoz for the acquisition and in-licensing of certain branded generic products across the Sub-Saharan Africa (SSA) region. The transaction covers four key markets—Western Sahara, Ghana, Nigeria, and Kenya—where Strides has an established operating presence. The integration of Strides’ existing operations with the Sandoz portfolio is expected to position Strides among the top five pharmaceutical companies in the SSA region by sales, and among the top two within its represented markets. The portfolio comprises multiple established brands across the anti-infective, cardiovascular, and dermatology segments. Several of these products individually record annual sales exceeding USD One Million, significantly bolstering the existing business meaningfully. The upfront consideration for the proposed transaction is USD 12 Million, payable at closing. The transaction also provides for royalty payments to Sandoz based on a percentage of net sales of Distribution Products.

  • Strides Pharma Science to acquire and in-license certain branded generic products from Sandoz across the Sub-Saharan Africa region.
  • The transaction covers four key markets where Strides has an established operating presence.
  • The integration is expected to position Strides among the top five pharmaceutical companies in the SSA region by sales.
  • The portfolio comprises multiple established brands across various segments with several products recording annual sales exceeding USD One Million.
  • The upfront consideration for the proposed transaction is USD 12 Million, with royalty payments to Sandoz based on a percentage of net sales of Distribution Products.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Strides Pharma Science Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BIJHANS] Bijoy Hans Ltd Announces Key Changes: New Name, Increased Borrowing Limits, and Executive Director Appointment
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bijoy Hans Ltd, a company based in Assam-India, has announced several significant changes. The company's name will be changed to 'Arvaya Healthcare Limited', subject to regulatory approvals. The Board of Directors has approved an increase in borrowing limits up to Rs. 200 Crores and the authorization of loans, guarantees, securities, and investments up to the same amount, both subject to shareholder approval. The Board also approved a revision in remuneration for the Managing Director and Chief Financial Officer, and the change in designation of Mr. Salil Shetty from Non-Executive Director to Executive Director and CEO. The company has appointed Mr. Chinmay Mohan Lele as the Scrutinizer for the postal ballot process. A non-binding LOI has been issued to GTT Data Solutions Limited for the development of a technology platform.

  • Change of company name to Arvaya Healthcare Limited
  • Increase in borrowing limits up to Rs. 200 Crores
  • Authorization of loans, guarantees, securities, and investments up to Rs. 200 Crores
  • Revision in remuneration for the Managing Director and Chief Financial Officer
  • Change in designation of Mr. Salil Shetty to Executive Director and CEO

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BIJOY HANS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BFUTILITIE] BF Utilities Ltd Appoints Mrs. Mugdha Rajesh Vartak as Additional Non-Executive Woman Independent Director
item.description:
BF Utilities Ltd announced the appointment of Mrs. Mugdha Rajesh Vartak as an Additional, Non-Executive — Woman Independent Director for a period of 3 (three) consecutive years, effective from March 17, 2026 to March 16, 2029. The appointment is subject to the approval of the Shareholders of the Company by way of postal ballot. Mrs. Vartak is a strategic and growth-focused HR leader with 20+ years of experience in various sectors. The Board of Directors approved her appointment at their meeting held on March 17, 2026.

  • BF Utilities Ltd appoints Mrs. Mugdha Rajesh Vartak as Additional, Non-Executive — Woman Independent Director
  • Mrs. Vartak's appointment is subject to the approval of the Shareholders of the Company by way of postal ballot
  • Mrs. Vartak has 20+ years of experience in various sectors
  • Her appointment is for a period of 3 (three) consecutive years, effective from March 17, 2026 to March 16, 2029
  • The appointment was approved at the Board meeting held on March 17, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BF UTILITIES LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SCTL] Suncare Traders Ltd. Closes Trading Window for Securities Dealing Until After Q4 Results Announcement in 2026
item.description:
Suncare Traders Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the securities of the company, in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will commence on Wednesday, 1st April, 2026 and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the announcement of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended on 31st March 2026. The date of the proposed Board Meeting for considering the audited financial results will be informed in due course.

  • Suncare Traders Ltd. closes trading window for securities dealing in accordance with SEBI regulations.
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after Q4 and year-end results announcement.
  • The closure is in line with the company's Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading.
  • The date of the proposed Board Meeting for considering the audited financial results will be announced in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Suncare Traders Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHREEGANES] Shree Ganesh Biotech Closes Trading Window for Securities Dealing Until After Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
Shree Ganesh Biotech (India) Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in the securities of the company, in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the announcement/declaration of Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended on 31 March 2026. The date of the proposed Board Meeting for considering the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended on 31 March 2026 will be informed in due course.

  • Shree Ganesh Biotech (India) Ltd. has closed its trading window for securities dealing
  • The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the Q1 2026 results
  • The date of the proposed Board Meeting for considering the audited financial results will be informed later
  • This is for information and record purposes

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shree Ganesh Biotech (India) Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TELECABL] Telephone Cables Ltd Announces Commencement of Insolvency Resolution Process
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Telephone Cables Ltd, a company incorporated on 11-04-1983, has announced the commencement of a corporate insolvency resolution process. The National Company Law Tribunal, Chandigarh, has ordered the commencement of this process. Creditors of the company are called upon to submit their claims with proof on or before 05th March 2026 to the interim resolution professional at the provided address.

  • Telephone Cables Ltd has commenced a corporate insolvency resolution process.
  • The National Company Law Tribunal, Chandigarh, has ordered the commencement of this process.
  • Creditors are required to submit their claims with proof on or before 05th March 2026.
  • The interim resolution professional's address for claim submission is provided in the document.
  • Financial creditors must submit their claims electronically.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Telephone Cables Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [MADHUCON] Madhucon Projects Ltd: Director Mr. Samba Siva Rao Resigns Due to Health Issues
item.description:
Madhucon Projects Ltd announced the resignation of Director Mr. Samba Siva Rao (DIN: 09526475) due to health issues. The resignation was approved by the Board of Directors through its Circular Agenda No. 100/2025-26 dated 14 March, 2026. The company made the announcement within 24 hours of receiving the resignation, albeit a day late due to the resignation being under process and the company's office being closed on Sunday. Mr. Samba Siva Rao is not holding any other directorships in other listed entities and confirmed that there is no other material reasons for his resignation other than those provided under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Madhucon Projects Ltd announced the resignation of Director Mr. Samba Siva Rao due to health issues.
  • The resignation was approved by the Board of Directors through its Circular Agenda No. 100/2025-26 dated 14 March, 2026.
  • The company made the announcement within 24 hours of receiving the resignation, albeit a day late due to the resignation being under process and the company's office being closed on Sunday.
  • Mr. Samba Siva Rao is not holding any other directorships in other listed entities.
  • Mr. Samba Siva Rao confirmed that there is no other material reasons for his resignation other than those provided under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MADHUCON PROJECTS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TELECABL] Telephone Cables Ltd Insolvency Process Commenced: Omkara Assets Reconstruction Pvt. Ltd Takes Over Debt from Stressed Assets Stabilization Fund
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) of M/s Telephone Cables Limited has been initiated by the National Company Law Tribunal Chandigarh Bench. The winding up petition, previously filed by M/s Bhushan Steel Limited in 2003, has been transferred from the Punjab & Haryana High Court Chandigarh. The debt of Telephone Cables Ltd, which originally belonged to IDBI, was assigned to Stressed Assets Stabilization Fund (SASF) and then further assigned to Omkara Assets Reconstruction Pvt. Ltd. The Official Liquidator attached to the Punjab & Haryana High Court was appointed as the Liquidator of the company. The NCLT Chandigarh Bench will proceed with the matter from the same stage at which it had reached before the Punjab & Haryana High Court.

  • Telephone Cables Ltd insolvency process initiated by NCLT Chandigarh Bench
  • Winding up petition transferred from Punjab & Haryana High Court Chandigarh
  • IDBI's debt assigned to Stressed Assets Stabilization Fund (SASF) and then to Omkara Assets Reconstruction Pvt. Ltd
  • Official Liquidator appointed by Punjab & Haryana High Court
  • NCLT Chandigarh Bench to proceed from the same stage as the Punjab & Haryana High Court

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Telephone Cables Ltd | Category: Corporate Action
